item.title: Some tech detail shots by @bricksgallery_cph of the laser cut steel frames. The ...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (5 medier)

@spogelsesmaskinen

Some tech detail shots by @bricksgallery_cph of the laser cut steel frames. The works are powered by a Fender guitar cable and a custom 5 volt power supply enclosure on the floor 🎛️🔌

item.title: … Og der blev lys 💙 Kunstværket ‘Den Blå Time’ og Helsingørs nye lysfestival GLØ...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (9 medier)

@spogelsesmaskinen

… Og der blev lys 💙 Kunstværket ‘Den Blå Time’ og Helsingørs nye lysfestival GLØD er officielt åbnet her til aften. Tusind tak alle jer, der trodsede mørket for at opleve lyset.

Den Blå Time opleves gratis på Kronborg i tidsrummet klokken 16.00-q8.30 alle dage i perioden 16.01-02.02.

Værket er skabt af lyskunstner @spogelsesmaskinen, lydkunstnerne @densorteskole og er kurateret af @majken_overgaard.

Se slideshow på Instagram
item.content:encoded:
🖼️ Slideshow (9 medier)

@spogelsesmaskinen

Den Blå Time opleves gratis på Kronborg i tidsrummet klokken 16.00-q8.30 alle dage i perioden 16.01-02.02.

Værket er skabt af lyskunstner @spogelsesmaskinen, lydkunstnerne @densorteskole og er kurateret af @majken_overgaard.

item.title: “Entelechy” relief is now on show @thedarlingcph with @bricksgallery_cph Entelec...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (5 medier)

@spogelsesmaskinen

“Entelechy” relief is now on show @thedarlingcph with @bricksgallery_cph

Entelechy (realisation of potential) is an ongoing research of flow forms and materials.

LED Screens, glass, stainless steel, electronics, original GIF animations, power supply - 50 x 35 x 12 cm

All custom hand build and designed by @spogelsesmaskinen at @art_hub_copenhagen 2025

Se slideshow på Instagram
item.content:encoded:

@spogelsesmaskinen

item.author: spogelsesmaskinen

item.title: I had the immense joy and honor of working with sound collective @densorteskole ...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (7 medier)

@spogelsesmaskinen

I had the immense joy and honor of working with sound collective @densorteskole and curator @majken_overgaard on creating a new sound and light installation in Christiansborg Palace Church @christiansborgslot in Copenhagen.

I have hand-build 10 glass and steel lanterns to experience during “The blue hour” in the church. The installation is open until 11/12 2024. Opening hours at @christiansborgslot

Majken Overgaard writes:
The blue hour describes the time of day when the sun sets and twilight descends. The center of the sun is below the horizon, and the blue wavelengths of light color the sky. Day fades, and night is on its way. Throughout history, people have marked this transition, gathered for the twilight hour, and allowed for a slower pace. Now, we mark The Blue Hour in Christiansborg Palace - The Chapel, creating a space for reflection with a new sound and light installation by Den Sorte Skole and Spøgelsesmaskinen.

Photos by @laerkeful 🩵👏

Se slideshow på Instagram
item.content:encoded:
🖼️ Slideshow (7 medier)

@spogelsesmaskinen

I had the immense joy and honor of working with sound collective @densorteskole and curator @majken_overgaard on creating a new sound and light installation in Christiansborg Palace Church @christiansborgslot in Copenhagen.

I have hand-build 10 glass and steel lanterns to experience during “The blue hour” in the church. The installation is open until 11/12 2024. Opening hours at @christiansborgslot

Majken Overgaard writes:
The blue hour describes the time of day when the sun sets and twilight descends. The center of the sun is below the horizon, and the blue wavelengths of light color the sky. Day fades, and night is on its way. Throughout history, people have marked this transition, gathered for the twilight hour, and allowed for a slower pace. Now, we mark The Blue Hour in Christiansborg Palace - The Chapel, creating a space for reflection with a new sound and light installation by Den Sorte Skole and Spøgelsesmaskinen.

Photos by @laerkeful 🩵👏

Se slideshow på Instagram
